yugen-downtime.settings.downtime-mode.hi: Toggles whether players can access and buy downtime actions.
yugen-downtime.settings.debug-mode.name: Debug Mode
yugen-downtime.settings.debug-mode.hint: Enables verbose developer logging for troubleshooting.
yugen-downtime.settings.rest-short-point: Downtime points awarded to players when completing a short rest.
yugen-downtime.settings.rest-long-points: Downtime points awarded to players when completing a long rest.
yugen-downtime.settings.craft-enabled.hi: Enables the crafting system, allowing players to spend downtime points to craft items from recipes defined by the GM.
yugen-downtime.control.title: yugen-downtime
yugen-downtime.notifications.no-points: You do not have enough downtime points.
yugen-downtime.notifications.not-active: Downtime mode is not currently active.
yugen-downtime.settings.interactive-mode: Toggles whether players see the interactive selection wheel when opening downtime.
yugen-downtime.notifications.no-token-se: Please select a controlled token to manage downtime.
yugen-downtime.notifications.no-gm-onlin: No active Gamemaster is online to process downtime actions.
